{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032315232843A6907BC2DAAC2443DD\"}"},"total":100},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6982838941984998147","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角冷漠无情，他如同舞台剧中的小丑，按照世界给他的剧本演奏着他的人生，为了神（宙斯）的欣赏而表演着，用生命表演着。……………主角能力强，为了目的不择手段，前期弱小，但冷静得疯狂（作者也很贴心）","text_exts":[{"e":76,"s":72,"text":"不择手段","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8D%E6%8B%A9%E6%89%8B%E6%AE%B5\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774250608AC2443DD%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226982838941984998147%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226906757580639439879%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8D%E6%8B%A9%E6%89%8B%E6%AE%B5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1625818891,"group_id":"6906757580639439879","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"烟花易逝，人情长存","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8wuKIKUgx9PudKZWJMEE7JTUQsKQsNu4AUqAnTcbojc","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0f9733d118fc4511a78ed40aaa7aaf26~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788372\u0026x-signature=c3u69k30wuMhDKmf%2FwGjJnHK2PI%3D","user_id":"2885591373190751","user_name":"长野原--宵宫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2885591373190751","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6906757580639439879","book_info":{"abstract":"苏叶一觉醒来，发现自己成为了神的新玩物，为了让自己活下去，不得不在各个动漫的世界里穿梭，耗尽智谋，竭尽蛮力，用尽一切去完成神的游戏，去取悦高高在上的神。而这一切却让他感到如此的兴奋，一个逻辑性自闭症的患者，没有善恶观念的他，会在这无尽的世界里堕落成为魔王？还是被感化成为贤者？这都不是问题的关键。他现在思考的只有一件事，怎么把神从他的王座上拉下来。约会大作战？为什么这里的女生这么好骗？钢之炼金术师？为什么要放弃已经到手的一切？学园默示录？她为什么要为了救我而死？fate zero，所谓的善恶到底是什么？纯洁的玛利亚？为什么要牺牲自己拯救背叛者？时间之墟？时间不再前行，灵魂将归往何处？弑神者？有让全世界都颤抖的力量为何选择守护？问题儿童？所谓善良原来建立在恶的尸体上？落幕，神啊，我的表演是否让你感到愉悦？现在是时候让我们算算总账了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/aaee1cb507d12def36c0a30e38dce3b1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"三硝基甲苯","author_id":"","book_id":"6906757580639439879","book_name":"小丑的游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6960975920484221448","read_count":"46","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1124376"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"400","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/aaee1cb507d12def36c0a30e38dce3b1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779434608\u0026x-signature=bRrial4VxYbXLFDeepLoHTX5aSE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"45"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032315232843A6907BC2DAAC2443DD\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":38,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17409,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":15952},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7182991012208427787","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"墙裂推荐！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672420830,"group_id":"6906757580639439879","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3197009791026148"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6906757580639439879","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5726462e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15726,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7182990660553949984","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本真的很好看，主角没有情感，是真的没有，从每一个字里都能看出来，真的很好看，哪怕有些世界我不知道是什么动漫，没看过这些也能津津有味地看下去，墙裂推荐！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672420795,"group_id":"6906757580639439879","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我的名字就是没有名字","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9xPSvtQwKiWu42Zt/FZuIP2oRTGRaNzrMpDIwvTQGJ5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b91b0cd95a90412ba52f326b27ec9300~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776789568\u0026x-signature=TNUvUvUEkAdFDBWkpJTrB5beLDE%3D","user_id":"3197009791026148","user_name":"莫有名字的无名氏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3197009791026148","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6906757580639439879","book_info":{"abstract":"苏叶一觉醒来，发现自己成为了神的新玩物，为了让自己活下去，不得不在各个动漫的世界里穿梭，耗尽智谋，竭尽蛮力，用尽一切去完成神的游戏，去取悦高高在上的神。而这一切却让他感到如此的兴奋，一个逻辑性自闭症的患者，没有善恶观念的他，会在这无尽的世界里堕落成为魔王？还是被感化成为贤者？这都不是问题的关键。他现在思考的只有一件事，怎么把神从他的王座上拉下来。约会大作战？为什么这里的女生这么好骗？钢之炼金术师？为什么要放弃已经到手的一切？学园默示录？她为什么要为了救我而死？fate zero，所谓的善恶到底是什么？纯洁的玛利亚？为什么要牺牲自己拯救背叛者？时间之墟？时间不再前行，灵魂将归往何处？弑神者？有让全世界都颤抖的力量为何选择守护？问题儿童？所谓善良原来建立在恶的尸体上？落幕，神啊，我的表演是否让你感到愉悦？现在是时候让我们算算总账了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/aaee1cb507d12def36c0a30e38dce3b1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"三硝基甲苯","author_id":"","book_id":"6906757580639439879","book_name":"小丑的游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6960975920484221448","read_count":"46","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1124376"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"400","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/aaee1cb507d12def36c0a30e38dce3b1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779434608\u0026x-signature=bRrial4VxYbXLFDeepLoHTX5aSE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5726462e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032315232843A6907BC2DAAC2443DD\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15726,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":872},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7179585488486679336","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔很好，剧情细腻，这本书你要去细看，才能发现他的优点，说实话我不是很喜欢开放结局，因为这要我自己去想。每一个世界结束后，我都在想，主角回去后的场景，以及最后的宙斯。真的，很有趣，你要把自己带入进去，即使你没看过这些动漫（比如我）。最后，希望这本优秀的书被更多人认识，推广"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671627587,"group_id":"6906757580639439879","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2t81wF10TL+4OHdW3ceTtTCzNt3jowjtvkIPcecJvSk","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8fd9338226ca497781b360a6be9b55eb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776796152\u0026x-signature=7p5ADkqu01ihmm6nbwhtf3ppr1A%3D","user_id":"4248989651181975","user_name":"对胡桃忠心耿耿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4248989651181975","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6906757580639439879","book_info":{"abstract":"苏叶一觉醒来，发现自己成为了神的新玩物，为了让自己活下去，不得不在各个动漫的世界里穿梭，耗尽智谋，竭尽蛮力，用尽一切去完成神的游戏，去取悦高高在上的神。而这一切却让他感到如此的兴奋，一个逻辑性自闭症的患者，没有善恶观念的他，会在这无尽的世界里堕落成为魔王？还是被感化成为贤者？这都不是问题的关键。他现在思考的只有一件事，怎么把神从他的王座上拉下来。约会大作战？为什么这里的女生这么好骗？钢之炼金术师？为什么要放弃已经到手的一切？学园默示录？她为什么要为了救我而死？fate zero，所谓的善恶到底是什么？纯洁的玛利亚？为什么要牺牲自己拯救背叛者？时间之墟？时间不再前行，灵魂将归往何处？弑神者？有让全世界都颤抖的力量为何选择守护？问题儿童？所谓善良原来建立在恶的尸体上？落幕，神啊，我的表演是否让你感到愉悦？现在是时候让我们算算总账了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/aaee1cb507d12def36c0a30e38dce3b1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"三硝基甲苯","author_id":"","book_id":"6906757580639439879","book_name":"小丑的游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6960975920484221448","read_count":"46","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1124376"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"400","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/aaee1cb507d12def36c0a30e38dce3b1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779434608\u0026x-signature=bRrial4VxYbXLFDeepLoHTX5aSE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.2078879e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032315232843A6907BC2DAAC2443DD\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"l
